description_long: This is a minimalist platform bed with a low-profile wooden frame and a simple, rectangular silhouette. The bed features a thick, light-colored mattress that sits flush with the frame, and a single matching pillow placed at one end. The bedding appears to be a fitted sheet, tightly covering the mattress with slight wrinkles visible along the edges. The wooden base is a rich brown, contrasting with the pale bedding and providing a sturdy foundation. There are no visible headboard or footboard elements, emphasizing the modern, streamlined design. The overall appearance is clean and functional, suitable for contemporary urban interiors or temporary outdoor urban setups.
description: A minimalist platform bed with a wooden base, light-colored fitted sheet, and a single pillow, lacking both headboard and footboard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bed, the wooden platform base, and the pillow positioned at the right end.
description_view_1: End view with the pillow facing forward, highlighting the bed's width and the thickness of the mattress.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the pillow now on the left, showing the same wooden base and fitted sheet.
description_view_3: End view from the foot of the bed, displaying the mattress surface and the pillow at the far end.
